summary.summary: Bumped the APP_DEV_VERSION value in Config.xcconfig from 0.8.3.12 to 0.8.3.13. The change is recorded in the commit titled "CI: Bump APP_DEV_VERSION to 0.8.3.13 [skip ci]" and modifies the Config.xcconfig file (see file:d16396b18a02, diff:ed8a240f07db, commit:47e456317a95).
summary.userFacingImpact: No evidence in the supplied diff that this change alters runtime behavior or user-facing features; it only updates a development/version string in Config.xcconfig. If confirmation is required about CI, build artifacts, or release metadata effects, request human review (see file:d16396b18a02, diff:ed8a240f07db).
